titles.title: PASTEUR Act of 2026
PASTEUR Act of 2026
Pioneering Antimicrobial Subscriptions To End Upsurging Resistance Act of 2026

A bill to amend the Public Health Service Act to establish a program to develop innovative antimicrobial drugs targeting the most challenging pathogens and most threatening infections, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
